Four persons P, Q, R and S are to be seated in a row, all facing the same direction, but not necessarily in the same order. P and R cannot sit adjacent to each other. S should be seated to the right of Q. The number of distinct seating arrangements possible is:

Statement: Either P marries Q or X marries Y
Among the options below, the logical NEGATION of the above statement is:

options.A: P does not marry Q and X marries Y.
options.B: Neither P marries Q nor X marries Y.
options.C: X does not marry Y and P marries Q.
options.D: P marries Q and X marries Y.

question:
Consider two rectangular sheets, Sheet M and Sheet N of dimensions 6 cm x 4 cm each.
Folding operation 1: The sheet is folded into half by joining the short edges of the current shape.
Folding operation 2: The sheet is folded into half by joining the long edges of the current shape.
Folding operation 1 is carried out on Sheet M three times.
Folding operation 2 is carried out on Sheet N three times.
The ratio of perimeters of the final folded shape of Sheet N to the final folded shape of Sheet M is __________.

Five line segments of equal lengths, PR, PS, QS, QT and RT are used to form a star as shown in the figure above.
The value of $\theta$, in degrees, is __________.

A function, $\lambda$, is defined by
$\lambda(p,q) = \begin{cases} (p-q)^2, & \text{if } p \ge q, \\ p+q, & \text{if } p < q. \end{cases}$
The value of the expression $\frac{\lambda(-(-3+2),(-2+3))}{(-(-2+1))}$ is:

Humans have the ability to construct worlds entirely in their minds, which don't exist in the physical world. So far as we know, no other species possesses this ability. This skill is so important that we have different words to refer to its different flavors, such as imagination, invention and innovation.
Based on the above passage, which one of the following is TRUE?

options.A: No species possess the ability to construct worlds in their minds.
options.B: The terms imagination, invention and innovation refer to unrelated skills.
options.C: We do not know of any species other than humans who possess the ability to construct mental worlds.
options.D: Imagination, invention and innovation are unrelated to the ability to construct mental worlds.

Which one of the following statements is correct?

options.A: Pyrolysis is an endothermic process, which takes place in the absence of oxygen.
options.B: Pyrolysis is an exothermic process, which takes place in the absence of oxygen.
options.C: Combustion is an endothermic process, which takes place in the abundance of oxygen.

question: Which one of the following is correct?

options.A: The partially treated effluent from a food processing industry, containing high concentration of biodegradable organics, is being discharged into a flowing river at a point P. options.B: The most important type of species involved in the degradation of organic matter in the case of activated sludge process based wastewater treatment is chemoheterotrophs.

question: Which of the following is/are correct statement(s)?

options.A: Back Bearing of a line is equal to Fore Bearing $\pm 180^\circ$.
options.B: If the whole circle bearing of a line is $270^\circ$, its reduced bearing is $90^\circ$ NW.

options.D: In the case of fixed hair stadia tachometry, the staff intercept will be larger, when the staff is held nearer to the observation point.

options.A: At pH above 9.25, only NH$_4^+$ will be present.
options.B: At pH below 9.25, NH$_3$ will be predominant.
options.C: At pH 7.0, NH$_4^+$ and NH$_3$ will be found in equal measures.
options.D: At pH 7.0, NH$_4^+$ will be predominant.

The baghouse is to be divided into 5 sections of equal cloth area such that one section can be shut down for cleaning and/or repairing, while the other 4 sections continue to operate.
